title: Data

jokes.text: How did he write the note?
jokes.setup: Story about a boy who asked Santa to teach him to read
jokes.punchline: Logical flaw pointed out with surgical precision
jokes.explanation: Perfect Veep-style logic bomb - maximum funny per word, devastatingly sharp observation delivered with casual cruelty

jokes.text: Well, they do need to stay thin.
jokes.setup: HIV positive girl dreams of becoming a ballerina
jokes.punchline: Casual reference to ballet dancers needing to be thin
jokes.explanation: Darkly inappropriate but perfectly in character - Selina's complete tone deafness to serious situations

jokes.text: I preferred the Internet when it was just AltaVista and that little Star Wars kid.
jokes.setup: Reddit users have identified the HIV girl
jokes.punchline: Yearning for simpler internet times with specific dated references
jokes.explanation: Solid reference comedy with specific cultural touchstones that date the character

jokes.text: Well, there's a town with no Gay Pride parade or a goddamn library.
jokes.setup: Parents don't want kids to 'catch AIDS' from the HIV girl
jokes.punchline: Connecting ignorance about HIV to broader cultural ignorance
jokes.explanation: Sharp social commentary disguised as throwaway line - efficiently paints the town's character

jokes.text: Oh, thank you, Question Man. You just saved the entire city. Or did you?
jokes.setup: Staffer asks obvious questions about the data breach
jokes.punchline: Sarcastic superhero nickname followed by immediate undermining
jokes.explanation: Good character-driven sarcasm with nice self-undermining twist

jokes.text: This is catching fire like a gas station in a Michael Bay movie.
jokes.setup: The HIV story is spreading rapidly
jokes.punchline: Specific pop culture metaphor for explosive situations
jokes.explanation: Competent metaphor but relies on pop culture reference without much twist

jokes.text: Bozos, disassemble.
jokes.setup: Ending the meeting
jokes.punchline: Mixing 'assemble' with calling them 'bozos'
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay with maximum economy - insult disguised as heroic command

jokes.text: Or a time whose problems I've suppressed.
jokes.setup: Talking about clothes reminding of an easier time
jokes.punchline: Casual admission of psychological repression
jokes.explanation: Nice character moment - casual darkness delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: I'm vaping. That's not the point.
jokes.setup: Accused of smoking
jokes.punchline: Correction that misses the actual issue
jokes.explanation: Good character beat showing Catherine's defensiveness and missing the point

jokes.text: He photographs well for his age.
jokes.setup: Catherine still seeing Jason
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment about aging
jokes.explanation: Sharp character observation delivered with casual cruelty

jokes.text: Is it a good apple? - It's a baking apple. - Fuck 'em.
jokes.setup: Apple Growers want to name apple after her
jokes.punchline: Immediate rejection based on apple quality hierarchy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina moment - instant vanity-driven decision making with rapid-fire delivery

jokes.text: Oh, my God, I look like Grandpa.
jokes.setup: Seeing aged photo of herself after 8 years
jokes.punchline: Unflattering comparison to male relative
jokes.explanation: Good visual reaction showing Selina's vanity and horror at aging

jokes.text: Yeah, I know. This is so disrespectful.
jokes.setup: Catherine asks what they did to her in the photo
jokes.punchline: Selina only caring about herself, not her daughter
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Selina's complete self-absorption

jokes.text: And... the girl, that is, has HIV.
jokes.setup: Mike trying to clarify his statement
jokes.punchline: Awkward clarification that makes it worse
jokes.explanation: Classic Mike bumbling - making bad situations worse through awkward clarification

jokes.text: Yeah, I know, he's fluffing the hacks.
jokes.setup: Mike doing press briefing
jokes.punchline: Sexual innuendo for managing the press
jokes.explanation: Clever sexual metaphor for press management - economical and sharp

jokes.text: Oh, thank you for remembering I have a daughter, ma'am.
jokes.setup: Selina mentions his daughter at Easter egg roll
jokes.punchline: Sarcastic thanks for basic human acknowledgment
jokes.explanation: Good press corps pushback showing Selina's general inattention to people

jokes.text: And also my name.
jokes.setup: Thanking for remembering his daughter
jokes.punchline: Also thanking for remembering his own name
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation - doubling down on the sarcasm with even more basic expectation

jokes.text: I mean, you know, I'm the rock star. She's not the rock star.
jokes.setup: Asking press to give Catherine privacy
jokes.punchline: Self-aggrandizing way to diminish daughter's importance
jokes.explanation: Peak Selina - turning request for daughter's privacy into self-promotion

jokes.text: I think some guy fucked a monkey.
jokes.setup: Where did HIV come from?
jokes.punchline: Crude oversimplification of HIV origins
jokes.explanation: Shock humor without much craft - relies on crude delivery for impact

jokes.text: You're right, I didn't.
jokes.setup: Selina says he didn't warn her about HIV questions
jokes.punchline: Mike immediately admitting fault instead of defending
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mike character moment - immediate capitulation showing his weakness

jokes.text: That's not just a breach. That's a data rupture.
jokes.setup: Calling it a data breach
jokes.punchline: Escalating to medical terminology
jokes.explanation: Clever escalation using medical metaphor for severity

jokes.text: 15% of them were hired to be fired.
jokes.setup: Young women in the West Wing
jokes.punchline: Revealing cynical hiring practice
jokes.explanation: Dark insight into political machinery - efficient and cynical

jokes.text: We call them the Expendabelles.
jokes.setup: Young women hired to be fired
jokes.punchline: Portmanteau of 'Expendables' and feminine suffix
jokes.explanation: Brilliant wordplay combining action movie with gender - highly quotable

jokes.text: Just another Saturday night.
jokes.setup: Being told to sacrifice a virgin
jokes.punchline: Casual reference to his dating life
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dan character moment - turning dark order into personal boast

jokes.text: Hey, Egan, is somebody gonna get fired over this AIDSnami?
jokes.setup: Asking about firing over HIV scandal
jokes.punchline: Portmanteau of AIDS and tsunami
jokes.explanation: Clever portmanteau that's both inappropriate and perfectly Jonah

jokes.text: I'm the Dan who can.
jokes.setup: Being put in charge of firing someone
jokes.punchline: Rhyming self-promotion
jokes.explanation: Simple wordplay but perfectly captures Dan's self-promotion instincts

jokes.text: He was up to his thighs in it.
jokes.setup: Describing involvement in the bill
jokes.punchline: Unusual body part metaphor for depth
jokes.explanation: Good Richard moment - weird phrasing that sounds wrong but isn't

jokes.text: How's the view from down there, you snake?
jokes.setup: Richard trying to throw him under the bus
jokes.punchline: Mixing low position metaphor with snake imagery
jokes.explanation: Good character insult showing Dan's ability to turn weakness into attack

jokes.text: Law and order mixed with very mild reggae.
jokes.setup: Choosing The Police as walk-on music
jokes.punchline: Overthinking the political implications of a band name
jokes.explanation: Brilliant overthinking of musical choice with perfect political consultant logic

jokes.text: It's like a comforting balance.
jokes.setup: Describing The Police's sound
jokes.punchline: Taking the analysis even further
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the absurd music analysis

jokes.text: This goat's not gonna scape itself.
jokes.setup: Having to leave to handle firing
jokes.punchline: Verb form of 'scapegoat'
jokes.explanation: Brilliant verbification showing Dan's casual approach to destroying careers

jokes.text: I'm just waiting for the press to throw me in a pond to see if I'll float.
jokes.setup: Feeling persecuted
jokes.punchline: Witch trial metaphor for media scrutiny
jokes.explanation: Good historical metaphor showing Jonah's persecution complex

jokes.text: Just like my actual honeymoon with Daddy.
jokes.setup: Comparing presidency to a shitty honeymoon
jokes.punchline: Uncomfortable detail about family dynamics
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable overshare that perfectly captures Catherine's boundary issues

jokes.text: What you'll look like when you're leaving office, except you look exactly like you do now.
jokes.setup: Describing The Onion parody
jokes.punchline: The joke is that she won't age because she'll leave quickly
jokes.explanation: Good explanation of a layered joke about political mortality

jokes.text: It's like my mom's cat.
jokes.setup: This thing has gotten way too big
jokes.punchline: Random comparison to pet obesity
jokes.explanation: Random comparison that's mildly amusing but lacks structure

jokes.text: Oh, God, welcome to my childhood. And adulthood, actually.
jokes.setup: Now parents hate us
jokes.punchline: Extending the timeline of parental hatred
jokes.explanation: Good escalation with self-deprecating personal revelation

jokes.text: She just did.
jokes.setup: Sue cannot tell me how to do my job
jokes.punchline: Pointing out she just did exactly that
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy in pointing out the obvious contradiction

jokes.text: the surgeon will be tweezering tiny shamrocks out of your eye jelly for a week.
jokes.setup: Warning about confetti cannon
jokes.punchline: Grotesque specific medical consequences
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly specific and grotesque imagery with 'eye jelly' being particularly revolting

jokes.text: I did balloons for Jerry Ford in '76. Met him. Asshole.
jokes.setup: Establishing his credentials
jokes.punchline: Casual dismissal of former president
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - casual presidential insult delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: I just named it Presidential because of that asshole Ford.
jokes.setup: The Presidential package sounds perfect
jokes.punchline: It's actually the worst option, named sarcastically
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback that recontextualizes the Ford insult while subverting expectations

jokes.text: Look, the news moves so quickly, we'll have a new iPhone or the Chinese will be in Chicago.
jokes.setup: Reassuring about the HIV story
jokes.punchline: Escalating from product launches to invasion
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing how news cycles work with absurdist endpoint

jokes.text: Sting might as well be singing 'I'll access your medical data' in a fake Jamaican accent.
jokes.setup: Every Breath You Take lyrics about watching
jokes.punchline: Recontextualizing as surveillance state anthem
jokes.explanation: Brilliant recontextualization of famous song with perfect political relevance and absurdist twist

jokes.text: He's the vice president, not the new Lexus.
jokes.setup: Light show is all cued up
jokes.punchline: Comparing VP intro to car commercial
jokes.explanation: Sharp comparison highlighting the absurdity of political pageantry

jokes.text: It's Ellie. Lee. Lee? Lee. Ah.
jokes.setup: Trying to remember staff member's name
jokes.punchline: Multiple wrong guesses and corrections showing complete unfamiliarity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina moment showing how little she knows her staff. Realistic cringe but not highly quotable.

jokes.text: Well, it's mostly self-help audio books and relaxation tapes. I'm quite an anxious man.
jokes.setup: What music do you have on your phone?
jokes.punchline: Oversharing about mental health to strangers
jokes.explanation: Good character moment with uncomfortable oversharing

jokes.text: Well, it's mostly self-help audio books and relaxation tapes. I'm quite an anxious man.
jokes.setup: Asked what music he has on his phone
jokes.punchline: Oversharing about mental health issues to strangers
jokes.explanation: Good minor character moment showing inappropriate workplace oversharing. Relatable anxiety humor.

jokes.text: Screwed over by the Police. I'm Rodney fucking King.
jokes.setup: Wrong music played at rally
jokes.punchline: Comparing musical mishap to police brutality
jokes.explanation: Dark but clever connection between band name and historical reference

jokes.text: Not Sting. Kurt Cobain. Well, not him.
jokes.setup: You were like a rock star
jokes.punchline: Correcting to better rock star, then remembering he's dead
jokes.explanation: Good Gary moment showing his tendency to overcorrect compliments

jokes.text: It's like getting a valentine from your own mom, you know?
jokes.setup: Of course her supporters loved her at her rally
jokes.punchline: Comparing to forced family affection
jokes.explanation: Perfect metaphor for political reality - sweet but ultimately meaningless

jokes.text: We'll be down to nano-donors.
jokes.setup: Losing micro-donors
jokes.punchline: Going even smaller in the donation scale
jokes.explanation: Good escalation using scientific terminology for political fundraising

jokes.text: Do I think it's the thing I should do? Is that your question, Mike?
jokes.setup: Mike questioning if she should make a statement
jokes.punchline: Mockingly repeating his question structure
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina condescension showing her intolerance for questioning

jokes.text: Girl in the writers' room for the joint sessions speech. She was also at the rally tonight. Sci-fi Sally something.
jokes.setup: Found a scapegoat
jokes.punchline: Casual dehumanization with made-up nickname
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Dan's casual cruelty and inability to remember names

jokes.text: I see splashes of myself in her. I now regret that phrase.
jokes.setup: Defending Lee by comparing to himself
jokes.punchline: Immediately realizing the sexual implications
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary moment - innocent comment followed by mortified self-awareness

jokes.text: Who's my sister-in-law who works for the American Family Group.
jokes.setup: Anonymous source revealed information
jokes.punchline: It's his own family member
jokes.explanation: Good reveal showing the incestuous nature of political journalism

jokes.text: Wouldn't work. You're talking to a guy who once broke off an engagement at an Applebee's, then ordered dessert.
jokes.setup: What if I cried like women in movies?
jokes.punchline: Revealing his complete emotional callousness with specific example
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character revelation - the Applebee's detail makes it perfectly brutal and memorable

jokes.text: Fitting that for Easter this story refuses to fucking die.
jokes.setup: HIV story continuing to dominate news cycle during Easter
jokes.punchline: Easter resurrection reference applied to negative news story
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark religious metaphor. Perfect timing and irreverent use of Easter imagery for political crisis.

jokes.text: Whatever happened to Ebola? I loved Ebola.
jokes.setup: Complaining about HIV story dominating news
jokes.punchline: Nostalgic for different deadly disease
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina moment - casually loving a deadly disease because it helped her politically

jokes.text: We need to cut the throat of a bigger goat.
jokes.setup: The sacrificed girl wasn't senior enough
jokes.punchline: Escalating the sacrificial metaphor
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of sacrificial metaphor with visceral imagery

jokes.text: You know, that kind of surprised masturbator face.
jokes.setup: Jonah has an inherently guilty look
jokes.punchline: Specific sexual comparison
jokes.explanation: Crude but specific character observation that's perfectly mean-spirited

jokes.text: Like a massive Easter Island-sized head.
jokes.setup: A bigger head needs to roll
jokes.punchline: Specific geographic comparison for Jonah's head size
jokes.explanation: Excellent specific metaphor for Jonah's distinctive physical feature

jokes.text: I could wear a child's hat.
jokes.setup: Defending himself about head size
jokes.punchline: Specific evidence of small head
jokes.explanation: Good Jonah defensiveness with specific absurd detail

jokes.text: Hey, 'I Am Groot,' stop swapping spit here with 'Pretty Woman'
jokes.setup: Telling Jonah and Richard to stop talking
jokes.punchline: Pop culture nicknames based on their appearances
jokes.explanation: Pop culture insults that work but rely heavily on reference humor

jokes.text: Damn, man, this guy's balls are so big, they're practically tits.
jokes.setup: Commenting on someone's boldness
jokes.punchline: Anatomical comparison that makes no sense
jokes.explanation: Crude humor that doesn't quite work logically - relies on shock value

jokes.text: That isn't, Jonah. That's sexual harassment.
jokes.setup: Jonah claiming breast grabbing is 'jock stuff'
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact correction about serious issue
jokes.explanation: Good Richard moment showing his unexpected clarity on serious issues

jokes.text: I wasn't bullied by you, I was bullied because of you.
jokes.setup: Selina saying Catherine wasn't bullied by her
jokes.punchline: Important distinction about indirect responsibility
jokes.explanation: Brilliant distinction that cuts to the heart of their relationship dynamics

jokes.text: Well, I apologize for my success, Catherine.
jokes.setup: Catherine explaining she was bullied because of Selina
jokes.punchline: Non-apology that makes it about her own achievements
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina - turning daughter's pain into celebration of herself

jokes.text: Are you bullying me into dropping an anti-bullying charity?
jokes.setup: Selina pressuring her to drop the charity work
jokes.punchline: Pointing out the perfect irony
jokes.explanation: Perfect irony that captures the absurdity and dysfunction of their relationship

jokes.text: You're parenting.
jokes.setup: Selina asking if she's bullying Catherine
jokes.punchline: Gentle euphemism for clearly problematic behavior
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary enabling with gentle euphemism for dysfunction

jokes.text: Well, then, why don't you tell me and I'll decide whether or not I know it?
jokes.setup: If you know, you'll be implicated
jokes.punchline: Trying to logic her way out of legal reality
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Selina logic - trying to retroactively decide on knowledge to avoid consequences

jokes.text: Don't give me that bunker shit. Hitler went into a bunker. When he came out, he wasn't chancellor anymore, was he? Plus he was dead.
jokes.setup: Advisor suggesting bunker mentality
jokes.punchline: Extreme historical comparison with matter-of-fact addition
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation with perfect deadpan delivery of obvious fact

jokes.text: I'll tell you something, if he were alive right now, he'd be very anxious to distance himself from me at this moment.
jokes.setup: Comparing herself to Hitler
jokes.punchline: Suggesting she's worse than Hitler
jokes.explanation: Incredible escalation - claiming to be worse than Hitler with perfect Selina self-awareness

jokes.text: This is a head-on collision and I'm your biggest air bag.
jokes.setup: Offering to resign
jokes.punchline: Car safety metaphor for political protection
jokes.explanation: Excellent metaphor that captures both Ben's role and the crisis severity

jokes.text: And that's sad 'cause that's your whole job.
jokes.setup: Mike is a terrible liar
jokes.punchline: Pointing out lying is his professional requirement
jokes.explanation: Sharp observation about the contradiction in Mike's professional skills

jokes.text: You leave a gap. We're not piss buddies.
jokes.setup: Confronting someone using adjacent urinal
jokes.punchline: Bathroom etiquette lesson with crude friendship terminology
jokes.explanation: Good bathroom etiquette joke with crude but memorable phrase. Character-appropriate territorial behavior.

jokes.text: Still, you leave a gap. We're not piss buddies.
jokes.setup: Using urinal next to him
jokes.punchline: Asserting bathroom etiquette boundaries
jokes.explanation: Good phrase that captures male bathroom dynamics

jokes.text: You swear by everything you hold dear in your hand right now?
jokes.setup: Making him swear to secrecy in bathroom
jokes.punchline: Reference to what he's holding while urinating
jokes.explanation: Decent bathroom humor with sexual innuendo

jokes.text: You did two tours of Afghanistan? Yes, ma'am. I saw my best buddy die over there. Blown to pieces by an IED.
jokes.setup: Selina trying to make small talk with Marine
jokes.punchline: Extremely heavy response to casual question
jokes.explanation: Effective cringe moment showing disconnect between political and military worlds

jokes.text: And me and Kent are about to turn into two horny cheerleaders and start making out.
jokes.setup: Dan saying this isn't real
jokes.punchline: Absurd escalation of the 'dream' scenario
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist escalation using incongruous sexual imagery

jokes.text: We'll skin you like a squirrel, clean you out like a dirty fucking chimney, and wear you like a glove puppet with my fingers sticking out of your dead fucking eyeballs.
jokes.setup: Threatening Jonah for trying to blackmail them
jokes.punchline: Extremely graphic and specific threat
jokes.explanation: Incredible creative threat with perfect escalation and grotesque imagery

jokes.text: I cannot endorse that message, but I do acknowledge it.
jokes.setup: Ben's extremely violent threat
jokes.punchline: Bureaucratic response to graphic violence
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kent response - bureaucratic language for extreme violence

jokes.text: How about Captain Loser? Or Big Chief Skidmark?
jokes.setup: Dan wanting a bigger title before resigning
jokes.punchline: Offering insulting fake titles instead
jokes.explanation: Standard insult humor but fits the context of Dan's desperation

jokes.text: Is that your son? He's gifted.
jokes.setup: Child vomiting during Easter event
jokes.punchline: Selina's inappropriate positive spin on child being sick
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment showing Selina's inability to handle awkward situations appropriately.

jokes.text: Oh, God, I meant southeast gate.
jokes.setup: Dan going out different door to avoid press
jokes.punchline: Realizing they gave him wrong directions into media
jokes.explanation: Standard mistaken direction gag with mild impact

tmdb_overview: Selina's team tries to find a scapegoat. Catherine wants to support an anti-bullying campaign.
insight: Eighty-three jokes in forty minutes: Veep's densest episode yet, sustained entirely through character escalation.
